title: AIS Virtual Architect
tagline: From idea to deployable Azure plan in minutes, not months.
summary: An agent-driven architecture experience that guides users from concept to costed, deployable Azure architecture — applying Microsoft and AIS best practices in real time.
problem: Architecture design has drifted from proactive customer collaboration to reactive documentation of what's already deployed. The whiteboard is gone. Sellers lack a fast path from idea to structured Azure consumption plan.
vision: A 360° engine: Design → Cost → Deploy → Consume → Align with Microsoft. Not just a tool — a new front door into AIS and an Azure Marketplace opportunity.

workflow.title: Design
workflow.summary: Progressive discovery through guided questioning and diagram ingestion

workflow.title: Cost
workflow.summary: Real-time pricing across all services using current Azure Retail Prices
details: SKU sizing across AKS, Fabric, Firewall, Defender, and more
Hourly, monthly, and yearly cost breakdowns
Discount modeling: EA, MACC, partner structures

workflow.title: Deploy
workflow.summary: Architecture diagrams and IaC-ready deployment plans

workflow.title: Consume
workflow.summary: FinOps views aligned to FOCUS spec and optimization scenarios
details: Run rate projections and trend analysis
Optimization scenarios: reserved instances, scaling, right-sizing
FinOps maturity alignment: Inform → Optimize → Operate
Budget alerts and anomaly detection guidance

workflow.title: Align
workflow.summary: Microsoft program alignment for ACR, MACC, and partner structures

audiences.value: Move from idea to structured Azure consumption plan in a single session
Generate Well-Architected designs with real-time cost validation
Receive deployment-ready architecture and IaC artifacts
Scenario-model costs with discount structures and optimization paths
Present costed proposals aligned to MACC and ACR commitments

differentiators: Applies AIS delivery experience and Microsoft best practices — not generic cloud advice
Real-time Azure pricing via Retail Prices API — not stale spreadsheets
FinOps-native from day one — aligned to FOCUS spec and FinOps Foundation phases
Outputs usable by engineering, finance, and sales — single source of truth
MACC and ACR awareness built in — connects architecture to Microsoft program goals
Progressive design, not big-bang — start with a napkin sketch, end with a deployment plan
